name: CoinGecko
description: CoinGecko provides comprehensive cryptocurrency data including prices, market caps, trading volumes, exchange data, and coin metadata — all for free without registration.
longDescription: CoinGecko is the world's largest independent cryptocurrency data aggregator, tracking over 10,000 tokens across 600+ exchanges. The free public API provides real-time and historical price data, market cap rankings, trading volume, price charts, exchange data, and detailed token metadata. No API key needed for the public endpoints.
affiliateText: Building a crypto dashboard? Deploy it on Netlify — free tier with unlimited personal projects.
